attributes.description: LNK files pointing at Office documents, PDFs, and text-heavy data files (doc/docx/xls/xlsx/ppt/pptx/pdf/rtf/odt/ods/odp/csv/txt/zip/7z). For IP-theft cases, this is THE list to walk: every document the user actually opened. Cross-reference with the Browser dashboard's download list to find docs the user pulled to disk and then opened.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"file.target.path : (*.doc or *.docx or *.xls or *.xlsx or *.ppt or *.pptx or *.pdf or *.rtf or *.odt or *.ods or *.odp or *.csv or *.txt or *.zip or *.7z)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: LNK Files: Office Documents, PDFs, Archives Opened
